title: Just Armor Hud
description: This mod add a simple Armor Hud!
body:
# **Just armor hud**
![Hud](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0376abe4d10183c9807a51dc3a45bc1d2d2dc3c3.png)

Have you ever been deep in a cave or in the heat of a PvP battle, only to have your chestplate shatter because you didn't notice its durability was low
